title: Hiring Store Manager at KFC India

jsonLd.title: Hiring Store Manager at KFC India
jsonLd.description:
KFC India is actively seeking a talented and motivated Store Manager to join our dynamic team in Delhi. This is an excellent opportunity for professionals who are passionate about making a real impact in a fast-growing organization.

About KFC India:
KFC India is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Manage store operations to ensure smooth daily functioning
• Achieve sales targets and improve store performance metrics
• Conduct regular stock audits and prevent pilferage
• Manage shrinkage and reduce stock discrepancies
• Assist in recruiting, onboarding, and performance management of staff
• Ensure visual merchandising standards are maintained at all times
• Prepare daily sales reports and share insights with management

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Sc / M.Sc in Life Sciences
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in SAP Retail
• Proficiency in Loyalty Programs
• Proficiency in Visual Merchandising
• Proficiency in CRM
• Proficiency in Planogram
• Proficiency in Loss Prevention
• Proficiency in Category Management
• Proficiency in Shrinkage Control

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Annual performance appraisal
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Delhi, Delhi, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with KFC India!
